channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dallas Stars sign goalie Jake Oettinger to an 8-year, $66 million extension
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jake Oettinger needed a new contract, and while the Dallas Stars knew they could play out the season and figure it out next summer, they wanted no part of that. They were willing to wait a little bit to lock up their No. 1 goaltender, and that patience paid off.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Olympic snowboarder on the run as he faces drug trafficking, murder allegations, officials say
item.description: Ryan Wedding, a former Olympic snowboarder from Canada, is accused by authorities of murder and running an international drug trafficking ring.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A Canadian former Olympic snowboarder is wanted in a US drug trafficking case
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A former Olympic snowboarder for Canada has been charged with running a drug trafficking ring that shipped vast amounts of cocaine across the Americas and killed four people, authorities said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Pendrith shoots 61 in first start since the Presidents Cup and leads in Las Vegas
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Taylor Pendrith took two weeks off after the Presidents Cup and didn't miss a beat, matching his career-low on the PGA Tour with a 10-under 61 that gave him an early three-shot lead in the Shriners Children's Open on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hold on, 49ers’ Nick Bosa isn’t lobbying for calls against Chiefs?
item.description: As Nick Bosa and the 49ers pursue Patrick Mahomes and the Chiefs on Sunday, keep an eye out for holding penalties, even if Bosa isn't aware of them.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: PGA of America director defends record-high Ryder Cup prices at Bethpage Black: 'Tier 1 event'
item.description: Ticket prices for the Ryder Cup at Bethpage Black next year are historically high, angering fans; but the PGA of America says it is justified.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Leonard won't play for Los Angeles Clippers to start the season while rehabbing knee, report says
item.description: Kawhi Leonard won’t play for the Los Angeles Clippers to start the season because of ongoing rehabilitation from inflammation in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NFL legend Troy Aikman rips 'lazy' Cowboys wide receivers after blowout loss
item.description: Troy Aikman didn't mince words when talking about the Dallas Cowboys' season on Thursday and he ripped the team's wide receivers in the process.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South Florida Athletics named a 'Best College Athletic Department' by Front Office Sports
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - University of South Florida Athletics has been named one of Front Office Sports’ “Best College Athletic Departments” for 2024.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: Yankees beat Guardians 6-3 for 2-0 ALCS lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge sent the ball soaring toward Monument Park and Gleyber Torres tagged up at first base. “That was disrespect out of Gleyber, man,” Judge said with a smile. “He’s seen me hit 58 of those things this year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Caleb Williams and the Bears are looking good at their bye with 3 straight wins and a 4-2 mark
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Caleb Williams is settling into a rhythm, and the Bears are racking up wins. Overall, things are looking good for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nevada could be latest to forfeit SJSU volleyball match amidst transgender lawsuit
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- The University of Nevada, Reno (UNR) could be the latest team to forfeit a women's volleyball match against San Jose State University.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Column: Caleb Williams has arrived and the Bears are a playoff team
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown impressive improvement in his first six games with the Chicago Bears, leading the team to three straight wins and a potential playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jerry West becomes first three-time inductee as Carter and Billups enter basketball's Hall of Fame
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Mass. (AP) — The stage was filled with Laker greats when Jerry West made history Sunday night by becoming the first three-time inductee to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Billy Crystal and Spike Lee take their places at the Hall of Fame as basketball superfans
item.description: Honored for his devotion to a basketball team that doesn't have a Hall of Fame history, Billy Crystal couldn't help but note the irony. The actor is being added to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame’s James F.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears TE Cole Kmet catches 2 of Caleb Williams' 4 TD passes, handles long snaps in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: WATCH: Jarrett Payton loves what he's seeing from the Bears' offense in the attached video from Monday's WGN Morning News. LONDON (AP) — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice. In a snap, you might say.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Jaguars: Teams battling in early-morning tilt at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Jaguars have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. Inactives for the Bears are DB Jaquan Brisker, DB Tyrique Stevenson, OL Nate Davis, DL Zacch Pickens, WR Velus Jones Jr., DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominque Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
